Name: IMF.P.Dimension.Clear
Purpose: Clear all elements from a target dimension before rebuild.

Parameters.Name: pBedrockProcess
Parameters.Description: Bedrock or wrapper process used for safe clear patterns.

Parameters.Name: pStrictBedrock
Parameters.Description: Stop when Bedrock delegation fails or is unavailable.
